case_title: LAI HA CARRIE LEUNG VS. CYNTHIA FAY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, LAI HA CARRIE AS TO DEFENDANT FAY, CYNTHIA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CYNTHIA FAY'S PSYCHIC ENERGY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
